# Spade

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Spade;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Spade { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
shape, suit, playing, cards

## Categories
shapes, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/spade)
